name: Edison National Bank
description_short: Regional bank serving Florida with personal and business banking services, checking, savings, loans, and online banking across Fort Myers, Sanibel, and Captiva locations.
description_long:
Edison National Bank is a regional financial institution operating in Southwest Florida with a focus on community-based banking services. The bank maintains multiple locations in the Fort Myers area and operates Bank of the Islands branches serving Sanibel and Captiva communities. Leadership includes CEO Geoff Roepstorff and President Robbie Roepstorff, who emphasize customer-centric service aligned with the bank's philosophical approach inspired by Thomas Edison's principle of finding "a better way."

The bank offers a comprehensive suite of personal and business banking products. Personal banking services include checking accounts, savings accounts, money market accounts, certificates of deposit, health savings accounts, and online/mobile banking. Personal lending products encompass home equity loans and lines of credit, auto loans, personal loans, and residential loans. Business customers can access business checking and savings accounts, business loans, online and mobile banking, bill pay, and cash management services. Commercial lending includes commercial real estate loans, business lines of credit, and general commercial loans.

Edison National Bank distinguishes itself through continuous receipt of the Bauer Financial 5-Star Superior Rating, indicating recognition as one of the strongest and most financially sound banking institutions nationally. The bank emphasizes traditional customer service and accessibility, offering 24-hour access via phone (800) 359-9034 and free mobile apps for iOS and Android devices. The institution operates four physical locations with specific hours and provides ATM access across its service areas. Wire transfer capabilities and lost/stolen card protection services are available to customers.

As a regional community bank, Edison National Bank serves customers seeking traditional banking relationships with local branch access and personalized service. The primary limitation is geographic scope—service is concentrated in Southwest Florida counties, making it inaccessible for customers outside this region. Prospective customers should verify current product offerings, rates, and fees directly, as the website provides service descriptions but limited specific product detail regarding interest rates, minimum balances, or loan terms. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Savings Accounts and Money Market Accounts
Home Equity Loans and Lines of Credit
Bill Pay and Cash Management Services
pros: Bauer Financial 5-Star Superior Rating indicating strong financial stability and dependability
Multiple physical branch locations in Fort Myers, Sanibel, and Captiva for in-person banking
Comprehensive personal and business banking services under one institution
Free mobile banking apps available for both iPhone and Android devices
24-hour phone access line for customer support and account inquiries
Established community bank with focus on customer experience and local relationships
Online banking platform (OnLine AnyTime) for account management and bill pay
cons: Limited geographic footprint—only serves Southwest Florida (Fort Myers, Sanibel, Captiva areas)
Website lacks specific information on interest rates, APYs, fees, and loan terms for comparison
No information about ATM network size or access outside primary branch locations
Limited detail on business lending qualification requirements or SBA loan programs
Regional institution may lack advanced digital features or investment products of larger national banks

contact.address: 13000 S Cleveland Ave, Fort Myers, FL 33907

best_for: Southwest Florida residents seeking local branch banking with community relationship focus
Small business owners needing business checking, loans, and cash management services
Customers prioritizing financial institution stability and 5-star safety ratings
People valuing in-person service and accessibility across multiple physical locations
diagnosis: Edison National Bank is best for Southwest Florida residents and small business owners seeking traditional community banking with strong financial ratings and local branch access. The primary caveat is strict geographic limitation to the Fort Myers, Sanibel, and Captiva area—customers outside this region cannot use this institution, and the website provides insufficient detail on rates, fees, and specific loan terms for thorough comparison with competitors.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 13000 S Cleveland Ave, Fort Myers, FL 33907
